meaning: adj.无效力的,无效的,无价值的,等于零的n.零,空,零迅号
examples: The contract was declared null and void.
A spokeswoman said the agreement had been declared null and void.
That vector is called a "null vector".
Parliament speaker Saad al-Katatni, of the Muslim Brotherhood, said the declaration was "null and void".
He has already indicated that he believes the ceremony in Begles to be null and void.
